title: Human Capability Initiative Conference
description:
Under the patronage of His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince, Prime Minister, and Chairman of the Human Capability Development Program (HCDP) Committee, the third edition of the Human Capability Initiative (HCI) Conference—one of the Saudi Vision 2030 Realization Programs—will take place on April 12–13, 2027, at the King Abdulaziz International Conference Center in Riyadh under the theme “The Human Code.”

The conference will focus on three pillars: deep human connection, sound reasoning amid complexity, and value-driven creation to safeguard human contribution and purpose in the age of accelerated technological advancement. HCI 2027 aims to attract more than 15,000 visitors and over 250 local and international speakers, including policymakers, thought leaders, and experts from government, private, nonprofit, and global institutions, providing a platform to exchange best practices and showcase inspiring global success stories.

The United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland will participate as Country of Honor, reflecting the strength of the Saudi-British strategic partnership in advancing human capability development. Building on the success of previous editions—which welcomed over 23,000 visitors, featured 550+ speakers, and announced more than 156 launches and agreements—the conference reinforces the Kingdom’s commitment to investing in human potential as a foundation for sustainable growth and global competitiveness in alignment with Saudi Vision 2030.

title: 24th ERRA Annual Conference
description:
The 24th ERRA Annual Conference takes place in Riyadh from February 1 to 3, bringing together international regulators, experts, and industry leaders to discuss the future of electricity sector governance and transformation. Hosted by the Saudi Electricity Regulatory Authority (SERA), the conference is held under the theme “From Oversight to Foresight: The Proactive Regulator in the Electricity Transformation.”

The conference explores forward-looking regulatory approaches, innovation in electricity markets, consumer protection, and evolving energy systems. It also reflects Riyadh’s growing role as a destination for major international forums and supports the Kingdom’s wider ambitions in energy leadership and sustainable development.

Registration

title: Immersive Experience: Flying Over Saudi
description:
“Flying Over Saudi” at Boulevard City, Riyadh offers a one-of-a-kind tourism and entertainment experience—the first of its kind in the Kingdom—inviting visitors into a fully immersive theater that engages all five senses through stunning visuals, surround sound, realistic motion, touch, and scent. Enjoy a 7-minute aerial tour that feels like flying, taking you across Saudi Arabia’s most breathtaking natural landscapes and iconic landmarks in an unforgettable, awe-inspiring journey through the Kingdom’s highlights.

Book Tickets

title: Next-Gen IoT Expo
description:
The Next Gen IoT Expo will take place at the Riyadh International Convention and Exhibition Center (RICEC), positioning Riyadh as a gateway to the future of technology. As the evolution of the prestigious IoT event in its fourth edition, the expo showcases cutting-edge next-generation Internet of Things (IoT) solutions integrated with Artificial Intelligence (AI), highlighting their impact across sectors such as healthcare, smart cities, logistics, manufacturing, banking, and more. Bringing together global tech leaders, policymakers, innovators, and international technology companies, the event serves as a dynamic platform for collaboration, knowledge exchange, and growth, featuring 100+ exhibitors, 50 conference speakers, 25 workshop sessions, and thousands of visitors, all focused on shaping smarter, more connected digital ecosystems.

Register Now

title: Saudi Makes Future AI Expo
description: From 14 to 16 December 2026, Riyadh will host Saudi Makes Future, the Kingdom’s premier innovation, culture, and education expo, inspired by the global We Make Future, the International Trade Fair on AI, Tech and Digital Innovation. Organized by PNG KSA in partnership with Search On Media Group, this landmark event will bring together entrepreneurs, innovators, educators, policymakers, and cultural leaders from across the world to explore the future of artificial intelligence, digital innovation, sustainability, and creative industries. With a rich program of talks, panels, startup competitions, and exhibitions, the event will serve as a catalyst for creativity, collaboration, and investment, aligning with Saudi Vision 2030 and reinforcing Riyadh’s role as a regional and global hub for technology and the knowledge economy.

title: CPHI Middle East
description:
CPHI Middle East returns in 2026 as the region’s most comprehensive pharmaceutical gathering, building on the success of its 2024 edition that welcomed over 30,000 visitors from more than 100 countries. With Saudi Arabia’s pharmaceutical market projected to reach USD 15 billion by 2028, the event positions itself at the forefront of Middle East and Africa’s growth, creating unmatched opportunities for global suppliers, regional drug manufacturers, and industry leaders to forge partnerships, exchange expertise, and drive innovation across the entire pharma value chain.

Register Now

title: Future Projects Forum
Poppy Playtime
description:
At Boulevard City, step into the eerie world of Poppy Playtime, where an abandoned toy factory hides sinister secrets. This immersive hide-and-seek horror challenge keeps you on edge as every shadow and corner could be a safe haven—or a trap. Combining suspense, mystery, and thrilling interactive gameplay, Poppy Playtime delivers one of most unforgettable and spine-tingling adventures.

Book Now

title: Music Festival: MDLBEAST SoundStorm
description:
SOUNDSTORM, the region’s boldest music festival, returns to Riyadh from 3 to 5 December 2026, transforming the city into a vibrant “City of Sound.” The event brings together global, regional, and local artists for three high-energy days of world-class performances, immersive experiences, and an electrifying atmosphere, cementing its place among the world’s leading music festivals.

Buy Tickets

title: Information Security Event: Black Hat
description:
Black Hat Middle East & Africa returns to Riyadh from December 1–3, 2026, for its fifth edition. The conference brings together 40,000+ attendees, 500+ global brands, 330+ CISOs, and over 300 expert speakers for three intensive days of innovation, networking, and knowledge-sharing. As a global hub for information security, the event will feature groundbreaking research on vulnerabilities, AI-driven protection, and emerging cyber threats, connecting professionals and decision-makers from across the world.

Register Now

title: Industrial Transformation Saudi Arabia
description:
Industrial Transformation Saudi Arabia, taking place 30 Nov – 2 Dec 2026 at Riyadh International Convention & Exhibition Center (RICEC), is a dedicated industry platform held under the patronage of the Ministry of Industry and Mineral Resources and powered by Hannover Messe’s global industrial network. The event brings automation, robotics, digitalization, energy solutions, industrial 5G, intralogistics, and additive manufacturing under one roof, enabling visitors to compare technologies through live demos and real use-cases, meet operations and procurement leaders, and explore practical insights across multiple content stages, including Innovation Summit sessions—making it a key destination for factories, EPCs, and system integrators accelerating industrial transformation in the Kingdom.

Register Now

title: Global Logistics Forum | UNCTAD Global Supply Chain Forum
description:
Under the patronage of the Custodian of the Two Holy Mosques, Riyadh will host the Global Logistics Forum (GLF) alongside UNCTAD Global Supply Chain Forum (GSCF) from November 29 to December 1, 2026. The two forums bring together global leaders, policymakers, and industry experts to shape the future of logistics and supply chains, reinforcing Saudi Arabia’s position as a leading global logistics hub connecting three continents.

Aligned with Saudi Vision 2030 and the National Transport and Logistics Strategy, the forums provide an international platform to strengthen partnerships, enhance sector competitiveness, foster innovation, and promote resilient, efficient, and sustainable global supply chains in the face of evolving geopolitical, economic, environmental, and technological challenges.

title: King Abdulaziz Falconry Festival
description: King Abdulaziz Falconry Festival returns from November 17 to 30, bringing together falconers from Saudi Arabia and around the world. Organized by the Saudi Falcons Club, the festival stands as one of the Kingdom’s leading heritage events, celebrating the deep-rooted tradition of falconry in the Arabian Peninsula. With prize money exceeding SAR 38 million, the event highlights the Kingdom’s commitment to preserving national heritage, raising public awareness of falconry traditions, and reinforcing Saudi Arabia’s position as a global hub for falconry in line with Vision 2030.

title: Saudi Falcons Club Auction
description:
Saudi Falcons Club Auction 2026 runs from October 1 to November 30, coinciding with the annual migration and capture season. Organized by the Saudi Falcons Club, the auction is one of the Kingdom’s leading falconry events, dedicated to locally captured falcons and supporting Saudi Arabia’s position as a global hub for falconry heritage.

Highly anticipated by falconers each year, the auction provides a professional platform that streamlines the buying and selling process while showcasing falcons through competitive live bidding sessions. The event is broadcast on television channels and streamed social media platforms, allowing wider participation from enthusiasts across the Kingdom and beyond. The auction also reflects a commitment to wildlife conservation by prohibiting the sale of endangered species and raising awareness of falcon protection, with particular focus on the saker falcon.

title: Esports Nations Cup
description:
The Esports Nations Cup (ENC) debuts in Riyadh in November 2026, bringing national-team esports to the global calendar in a structured, recurring format where players compete under their country’s flag and fans rally behind national pride. As a nation-based complement to club competitions, ENC is built through local partnerships with national esports bodies and wider stakeholders to strengthen grassroots ecosystems, and will feature only top-tier titles selected in collaboration with confirmed publishers including Chess.com, MOONTON Games, SNK, Electronic Arts, Krafton, and Ubisoft.

National Team Partner applications are now open to help countries lead team selection and operations on the road to ENC 2026, with the tournament launching as part of a four-week esports festival in Riyadh before adopting a rotating host-city model for future editions and returning every two years.

Apply Now

title: General Aviation Airshow — AERO Middle East x Sand & Fun
description:
Riyadh will host AERO Middle East x Sand & Fun 2026 from 24–28 November at Thumamah Airport, organized by the Saudi Aviation Club in partnership with Messe Frankfurt Saudi Arabia. Set to be the largest general aviation event in the Middle East, the exhibition will unite leading global manufacturers, avionics and navigation providers, and MRO companies, covering the full aviation value chain.

The event will also spotlight startups in advanced air mobility and eVTOL technologies, alongside live flying displays and interactive public experiences. Supporting the objectives of Saudi Vision 2030, the exhibition reinforces the Kingdom’s ambition to become a global hub for general aviation and innovation in future air mobility.

Register Now

title: Solar & Storage Live
description:
Solar & Storage Live—Saudi Arabia’s largest renewable energy exhibition—takes place in Riyadh on 23–25 November at Riyadh Front, bringing together the people and technologies driving the Kingdom’s transition to a greener, smarter, and more energy-efficient future. Focused on the full lifecycle of residential, commercial & industrial, and utility-scale solar and storage projects—from design and construction to operation—the event connects utilities, independent power producers, financiers, government and regulators, large energy users, and energy start-ups to explore innovative solutions, discover the latest products and services, and build partnerships that help future-proof the region’s energy sector.

Register Now

title: Cityscape Global
description:
Cityscape Global returns to Riyadh on 16–19 November 2026 at the Riyadh Exhibition & Convention Centre (Malham), bringing together developers, investors, policymakers, and industry leaders to explore the future of urban living and the next chapter of real estate growth in Saudi Arabia and beyond. Aligned with Vision 2030, the event serves as a major platform for investment and opportunity—showcasing landmark developments and giga projects while highlighting the Kingdom’s rapidly evolving market, especially as property ownership expands to non-Saudis, making this a key moment to connect, discover new prospects, and engage with one of the world’s fastest-growing real estate destinations.

Register Now

title: Saudi Elenex
description:
Saudi Elenex 2026 (27th Edition) returns to Riyadh on 16–19 November 2026 at the Riyadh International Convention & Exhibition Center, continuing more than 27 years as a leading meeting point for the sectors of electricity, alternative energy, air conditioning, lighting, and water technology. The exhibition offers structured opportunities to connect with key decision-makers and buyers—bringing together distributors, trade buyers, project owners, consultants, architectural engineers, and specifiers—to discover, compare, and source innovative products, solutions, and services from industry professionals, suppliers, and solution providers across the region.

Register Now

title: Foodex Saudi
description:
Foodex Saudi (14th Edition) takes place in Riyadh on 16–18 November 2026 at The Arena, bringing together the global food and beverage industry at Saudi Arabia’s leading international food & drink trade exhibition. Visitors can explore and source products and solutions from exhibitors representing 50+ countries, connect with suppliers and industry professionals, and discover new trends across the sector. The event also features Salon Culinaire—a professional chef competition endorsed by the World Association of Chef Societies and supported by Saudi chef organisations—showcasing top culinary talent from leading hotels and restaurants.

Register Now

title: Intersec Saudi Arabia
description:
Intersec Saudi Arabia is the leading and largest trade fair for security, safety, and fire protection—returns in October 2026, bringing together high-profile buyers, decision-makers, and industry leaders seeking the latest technologies and solutions. The event is a prime platform to discover innovations across security systems, safety solutions, and fire protection, connect with suppliers and experts, and explore new partnerships that support safer, more resilient environments across the Kingdom.

Register Now

title: Misk Global Forum
description: The Misk Global Forum (MGF) returns with its highly anticipated Legacy Edition, marking a decade of youth-led innovation, bold ideas, and real impact. As the region’s largest youth-focused annual gathering, organized by the Misk Foundation, the forum brings together young leaders, entrepreneurs, creatives, and changemakers from around the world. Celebrating years of youth-driven influence, MGF26 offers an inspiring platform to connect, collaborate, and shape the future through dialogue, innovation, and transformative action.

title: Saudi Drone Exhibition SADEX
description:
Saudi Drone Exhibition SADEX 2026 takes place in Riyadh on 9–11 November 2026, bringing together the full drone and Unmanned Aircraft Systems (UAS) ecosystem—manufacturers, regulators, investors, operators, and end users—under one roof to power the next generation of unmanned aviation. Across a three-day exhibition and conference, the event showcases cutting-edge advances in smart aerial mobility, autonomous logistics, AI integration, and communications, while offering tailored matchmaking that connects exhibitors with decision-makers, government buyers, mega-project leaders, and industry executives to unlock partnerships and new business opportunities. With international participation from 20+ countries, SADEX is positioned as a key platform for collaboration, investment, and technology exchange accelerating UAS adoption across Saudi Arabia’s growth sectors.

Register Now

MAVEX 2026 (Marine Autonomous Vehicles Exhibition)
Running alongside SADEX 2026, MAVEX 2026 is Saudi Arabia’s landmark exhibition dedicated to unmanned maritime systems—including USVs, UUVs, and ROVs—showcasing the latest in autonomous maritime and naval technologies. Leveraging the Kingdom’s strategic coastal geography, MAVEX highlights innovation across ports operations, naval protection, offshore oil, marine ecology, intelligent logistics, leisure navigation, and aquaculture, positioning Riyadh as a meeting point for maritime autonomy and next-generation ocean solutions.

SAUDI UGV 2026 (Unmanned Ground Vehicles Exhibition)
Also co-located with SADEX 2026, SAUDI UGV 2026 debuts as the Kingdom’s dedicated platform for Unmanned Ground Vehicles, spotlighting breakthroughs in robotics, artificial intelligence, and autonomous mobility. Designed to drive innovation and cross-sector collaboration, the exhibition focuses on real-world operational needs across homeland security, energy, logistics, and industrial applications, connecting solution providers with stakeholders shaping the future of ground autonomy in Saudi Arabia.

title: Seamless Saudi Arabia
description:
Seamless Saudi Arabia is the Kingdom’s most comprehensive event for digital commerce, next-generation payments, and embedded finance, bringing together the full value chain—from digital marketing and e-commerce platforms to in-store retail technology, omnichannel customer experiences, and innovative payment solutions. It’s where merchants, SMEs, retailers, banks, payment providers, logistics leaders, and policymakers meet to explore how every customer touchpoint—from the first ad click to checkout and doorstep delivery—is being reimagined, and to connect with partners and technologies shaping seamless checkout journeys, embedded finance tools, digital loyalty programmes, and the wider payments ecosystem supporting Saudi Arabia’s digital economy.

Register Now

title: Saudi Build
description:
Saudi Build 2026 (36th Edition) takes place in Riyadh on 2–5 November 2026 at the Riyadh International Convention & Exhibition Center, continuing more than 36 years as a leading meeting point for the Kingdom’s building and infrastructure sectors. The exhibition offers structured opportunities to connect with key decision-makers—bringing together distributors, trade buyers, project owners, consultants, architectural engineers, and specifiers to source products and explore innovative solutions from industry professionals and suppliers. Key showcase areas include interior design and finishing, construction and building materials, Stone Tech, PMV (plants, heavy machinery and vehicles), wood and production technologies, construction technologies and services, special construction services, and aluminium, doors, facades, glass and windows.

Register Now

title: Global Health Exhibition
description:
Global Health Exhibition 2026 takes place in Riyadh on 26–29 October 2026 at the Riyadh Exhibition and Convention Center (Malham) under the theme “Invest in Health,” bringing together global healthcare leaders, decision-makers, investors, and innovators to shape the next era of health. The event spotlights the trends and partnerships accelerating digital transformation and new models of care—from AI in clinical practice and digital health to workforce evolution and breakthrough medical technologies—through a major exhibition and multi-stage conference programme. Key stages include the Leaders Summit, Medical Excellence Forum, Digital Health Forum, and Investor x Venture Forum, offering attendees real-world insights, networking, and opportunities to explore a more integrated, tech-driven healthcare ecosystem.

Register Now

title: Future Investment Initiative
description:
In 2026, the Future Investment Initiative (FII) returns to Riyadh on 26–29 October, marking its 10th anniversary as a global platform that convenes influential leaders, investors, innovators, and policymakers to shape the next era of the world economy. As technology, AI, capital markets, and geopolitics evolve at unprecedented speed, FII 2026 offers a high-level space for dialogue, partnerships, and forward-looking ideas—bringing together an international community focused on investment, impact, and sustainable global growth.

Register as a Member

title: Global PropTech Summit
description:
Under the patronage of H.E. Majed Bin Abdullah Al-Hogail, Minister of Municipalities and Housing and Chairman of the Board of Directors of the Real Estate General Authority, the PropTech event takes place in October 2026 under the theme “Innovation for a Sustainable Future.” Focused on the fast-growing intersection of technology and real estate, the programme highlights how smart solutions are reshaping the sector—from digital platforms and data-driven services to tools that improve efficiency, transparency, and reliability. Aligned with Saudi Vision 2030, the event supports innovation and entrepreneurship while showcasing market-ready technologies that help the real estate ecosystem stay competitive in an era of rapid technological change.

Register Now

title: Saudi Agriculture
description:
Saudi Agriculture 2026 (43rd Edition) takes place in Riyadh on 19–22 October 2026 at the Riyadh International Convention & Exhibition Center, continuing decades of leadership as one of the region’s most important B2B gatherings for agriculture, food, aquaculture, packaging, and agro-industry. The exhibition brings together entrepreneurs, industry professionals, decision-makers, and suppliers to explore advanced technologies, engineering solutions, and innovations across key sectors including farming, poultry, agro & organic food, food processing and packaging, aquaculture, livestock and dairy, greenhouses, veterinary, and innovation and entrepreneurship. 

Register Now

title: MIPIM Middle East
Jewels of the World – Autumn Edition
description:
Jewels of the World Saudi Arabia returns to Riyadh for its Autumn Edition, presenting an exclusive showcase of fine jewellery, luxury watches, and contemporary design from leading international and regional brands.

Taking place from October 11–15, 2026, at Mandarin Oriental Al Faisaliah, the exhibition brings together a curated selection of heritage craftsmanship and modern creations within a premium retail environment. Recognized as one of the Kingdom’s leading luxury events, it attracts jewellery enthusiasts, collectors, and high-intent buyers, offering a unique opportunity to discover exceptional pieces and engage directly with renowned designers and brands.

As part of a series hosted across Riyadh, Jeddah, and Al Khobar, Jewels of the World continues to celebrate innovation, artistry, and the evolving luxury landscape in Saudi Arabia, with Riyadh standing at the forefront as the Kingdom’s capital of luxury.

Register Now

title: World Stadiums and Arenas Summit | Athlete 360
description:
The World Stadiums and Arenas Summit—the region’s largest stadiums and sports facilities conference and exhibition—returns to Riyadh at Hilton Riyadh Hotel & Residences. This flagship gathering brings together global leaders, architects, developers, government stakeholders, and sports federations to showcase cutting-edge technologies, sustainable design solutions, and best practices in building and upgrading stadiums and sports venues. With Saudi Vision 2030 driving major investment in sports and entertainment infrastructure, the summit offers a front-row view of the latest industry trends—from smart stadiums to eco-friendly facilities—and how they are shaping the future of sport in the Kingdom and beyond.

Register Now


World Sports 360 Summit | Athlete 360

Co-located with the World Stadiums and Arenas Summit, World Sports 360 Summit | Athlete 360, brings together global experts, elite athletes, coaches, and industry leaders to shape the future of sports, wellness, and human performance in the Kingdom. Focused on integrating performance and health, the programme spotlights cutting-edge performance optimisation (recovery, data-driven training, and advanced technology), holistic athlete development (nutrition, sports medicine, mental resilience, and long-term wellbeing), and the evolving Saudi sports landscape powered by Vision 2030. Expect practical insights, knowledge exchange, and forward-looking discussions spanning the sports economy, club management, revenue strategies, talent development and scouting, and the latest innovations in athlete technology and performance.

Register Now

 

The programme also features the World Stadiums and Arenas Awards, celebrating standout achievements in stadium and arena development across 10 categories highlighting innovation, sustainability, and exceptional project delivery—including architectural design for new venues, renovation and modernisation, innovative materials, multi-use design, creative lighting, eco-friendly architecture, community and social impact, safety and security leadership, accessibility and inclusivity initiatives, and the People’s Choice Award for outstanding stadium design.

title: WPC Energy Congress
description:
WPC Energy Congress 2026 will take place from October 11–15, 2026, in Riyadh, marking the first time the prestigious global event is hosted in Saudi Arabia. Held under the theme “Pathways to an Energy Future for All,” the Congress will bring together world leaders, ministers, CEOs, and experts from over 100 countries to explore sustainable, secure, and inclusive energy pathways.

Organized by the Ministry of Energy, the event will feature high-level discussions, a large-scale exhibition showcasing more than 300 companies, and dedicated programs for youth and innovation. With an expected attendance of over 25,000 participants, the Congress stands as one of the world’s leading platforms shaping the future of energy.

Register Now

title: Metal & Steel Exhibition / FABEX
description:
FABEX Saudi Arabia (12th International Exhibition for Steel, Steel Fabrication, Metal Forming and Finishing) takes place in Riyadh on 11–14 October 2026 at the Riyadh International Exhibition Center, bringing together global technology leaders, manufacturers, engineers, suppliers, and decision-makers across the Gulf. As a premier hub for the metal, steel, and manufacturing industries—co-located with MACH Saudi Arabia and Metal & Steel Saudi Arabia—FABEX showcases the latest in CNC, cutting and laser machinery, robotics and automation, welding technologies, foundry and casting equipment, sheet metalworking and forming, finishing machinery, cranes and tools, offering a high-impact platform for innovation, partnerships, and business opportunities aligned with Saudi Arabia’s fast-expanding industrial and steel landscape.

Register Now

title: Saudi Falcons & Hunting Exhibition
description:
International Saudi Falcons and Hunting Exhibition 2026 takes place from October 1 to 10 at the Riyadh Exhibitions and Conferences Center in Malham, bringing together one of the world’s largest events dedicated to falconry heritage, hunting, and outdoor pursuits. Organized by the Saudi Falcons Club, the exhibition reflects the Kingdom’s commitment to preserving national heritage and strengthening its global position in falconry.

The event spans culture, entertainment, tourism, and environmental sectors, showcasing a wide selection of falcons, hunting equipment, outdoor gear, and specialist products from local and international brands. It also features dedicated areas for industry displays and commercial platforms representing leading global names in the sector.

Designed for enthusiasts and families alike, the exhibition offers a broad visitor experience through interactive activities, heritage showcases, and educational programs that introduce the traditions of falconry and hunting to current and future generations.

title: Riyadh Season: BLVD City
description: Boulevard City returns as one of Riyadh Season’s most iconic entertainment hubs, offering a vibrant mix of attractions, from the dazzling dancing fountain to upscale dining, shopping, theaters, and immersive experiences for all ages. Visitors can explore OLULOU, where a towering dinosaur skeleton offers the perfect photo op, and let kids dive into four imaginative zones at PLAY-TOPIA. For thrill-seekers, Poppy Playtime delivers suspense inside an abandoned toy factory, A Lot Like Life challenges your bravery in a zombie outbreak, and The Conjuring opens October 15 with spine-chilling scenes from the haunted universe of Annabelle. Families can brave the haunted farm at Zeela House, while pop culture lovers enjoy FUNKO (from Nov 15), with giant figures and collectibles, and gamers embark on a real-world adventure inside MINECRAFT (also from Nov 15). Launching December 18, Flying Over Saudi offers a groundbreaking 5D flight experience that takes you on a 7-minute immersive ride above Saudi Arabia’s most iconic landmarks.

title: Melwah Falcon Racing
description:
Melwah Racing 2026 takes place from October 4 to 9, bringing together falconers and enthusiasts for one of the Kingdom’s most anticipated falconry competitions. Organized by the Saudi Falcons Club, the event celebrates a traditional sport deeply rooted in Saudi heritage while supporting the Kingdom’s position as a global hub for falconry.

Held on an expansive field, the race tests the speed, agility, and training of competing falcons. Birds are released from the arms of their handlers and fly toward a lure operator positioned 200 meters away, with the fastest recorded times determining the winners across multiple categories. Featuring financial prizes and prestigious titles, Melwah Racing highlights the close bond between falconer and bird, while promoting public interest in this historic tradition.

title: BLVD City: House of Hype
description:
House of Hype at BLVD City invites you into an immersive world of 50+ interactive experiences, blending the thrill of video games, fashion, music, and social media trends. Open from Tuesday to Saturday, 5 PM to 2 AM (last entry at 1 AM), this vibrant space offers families and friends a gateway to unforgettable adventures — from gaming and exploring to shopping exclusive drops, unlocking surprises, and winning prizes. It’s a dynamic, ever-evolving universe where you don’t just watch the hype — you live it.

Book Now

title: Saudi Procurement Conference
description:
The Saudi Procurement Conference (6th Edition) takes place in Riyadh on 7–8 October 2026 at the DoubleTree by Hilton Riyadh Financial District Hotel & Suites, bringing together the Kingdom’s procurement community and regional leaders to explore the next frontier of procurement transformation. With 400+ senior delegates, 40+ speakers, and leading sponsors and partners, the conference spotlights priorities such as digital innovation, sustainable sourcing, supplier collaboration, cost optimization, and strategic value creation through keynote sessions, executive panels, and interactive discussions—offering a high-impact platform for learning, networking, and business growth aligned with Vision 2030.

Register Now

title: CFO Leadership Summit
description:
The 26th Edition CFO Leadership Summit – Saudi Arabia will take place on October 7, 2026, at Riyadh Marriott Hotel, bringing together senior finance leaders to explore the future of financial leadership under the theme “Redefining the Future of Financial Leadership.”

The summit will address the evolving role of CFOs in navigating digital transformation, economic uncertainty, and shifting market dynamics, offering expert-led discussions, panel sessions, and real-world insights. With participation from over 200 finance executives, the event provides a strategic platform for knowledge exchange, networking, and innovation, focusing on areas such as AI integration, financial agility, and sustainable growth.

Certified by the CPD Certification Service, attendees will receive a CPD certificate upon completion.

Register Now

title: Saudi Lifestyle Week
description:
Saudi Lifestyle Week takes place in Riyadh on 5–7 October 2026 at the Riyadh International Convention & Exhibition Center, creating a new meeting point between international lifestyle brands and Saudi Arabia’s fast-growing, multi-channel retail ecosystem. As the first international event in the Kingdom to unite Fashion (clothing, lingerie, beachwear), Sportswear (apparel, accessories, and sports equipment), and Design (furniture and interior design) on one platform, the show offers visitors and industry professionals a vibrant space to discover new collections, explore trends, and build strategic partnerships—opening doors to fresh opportunities across fashion, sportswear, footwear and accessories, textiles, and interior design.

Register Now

title: Global CSR Forum
E3 Customer Experience Conference
description:
The E3 Customer Experience Conference (6th Edition) takes place in Riyadh on 29–30 September 2026, bringing together leaders and practitioners to shape the next generation of customer experience in Saudi Arabia’s fast-growing market. Supported by Tajriba and the National CX Academy Saudi Arabia, the event spotlights how AI, digital transformation, and analytics are redefining customer interactions in line with Vision 2030, with sessions covering customer journey mapping, omnichannel strategies, personalisation, brand experience, and emerging technologies. The programme features a multi-format experience including a conference, C-level CX masterclass, workshops, a CX Startup Zone, an exhibition, and the CX Hackathon, offering practical insights and connections to help organizations strengthen loyalty and satisfaction.

Register Now

title: The Saudi Food Show
description:
The Saudi Food Show returns to Riyadh Front Exhibition & Convention Center, bringing together global food and beverage leaders to showcase the latest trends, products, and innovations shaping the Kingdom’s fast-growing F&B sector. Alongside the exhibition floor, the Elite Lounge serves as the heart of the Tawasul Meetings—a premium space where top buyers meet top brands and conversations turn into real business impact. Visitors can also catch the excitement at Top Table Saudi, featuring chef-led masterclasses, bold flavours, and standout culinary moments from global icons and local talent, while the Saudi Food Summit delivers interactive sessions on everything from branding strategy to industrial incentives, helping shape the future of F&B. For coffee lovers, Coffee World adds another layer of energy with hands-on masterclasses blending flavour, technique, and passion.

Book Now

title: Facility Management Conference & Exhibition
description:
The International Conference & Exhibition for Facility Management 2026 returns to Riyadh for its third edition from 20–22 September 2026 at the Riyadh International Convention & Exhibition Center, under the theme “Smart Facilities – Smart Cities.” Bringing together sector leaders, local and international experts, and innovators, the event highlights the latest technologies and solutions shaping smarter, more sustainable urban environments—showcasing the integration of facility management with digital transformation, IoT, and artificial intelligence. With a focus on global and local best practices, knowledge exchange, and future-ready solutions that enhance efficiency, sustainability, and quality of life, the conference supports Saudi Vision 2030 and the Kingdom’s journey toward smart infrastructure and advanced resource management.

Register Now

title: Global Infrastructure Expo
description:
The Global Infrastructure Expo to take place from 15–17 September 2026 at the Riyadh International Convention & Exhibition Center, bringing together thousands of infrastructure professionals and leading local and international brands to support projects across the Kingdom’s rapidly expanding development landscape. Co-located with the Smart Cities Saudi Expo, the event offers unmatched access to suppliers, solutions, and partnerships across the full spectrum of infrastructure—helping visitors discover practical innovations, connect with experts, and explore opportunities aligned with Saudi Arabia’s ambitious long-term growth and large-scale development journey.

Inquire Now

title: Global AI Summit (GAIN)
description:
Under the patronage of His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al-Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, the Global AI Summit (GAIN 2026) takes place at King Abdulaziz International Convention Centre in Riyadh, bringing together global leaders, innovators, and decision-makers to explore how generative AI can move from ambitious theory to real-world outcomes. Through keynotes, discussions, showcases, and immersive experiences, the summit focuses on the big questions shaping AI’s future—responsible development, practical adoption, and collaboration—highlighting breakthroughs that can accelerate progress, strengthen resilience, and create measurable benefits for people and communities worldwide.

Live Stream of GAIN

title: Smart Cities Saudi Expo
description:
The Smart Cities Saudi Expo takes place in Riyadh from 15–17 September 2026 at the Riyadh International Convention & Exhibition Center, showcasing innovative technologies and solutions that support smarter, more connected communities across the Kingdom. Co-located with the Global Infrastructure Expo, the event brings together the full ecosystem of smart city technologies, urban planning, and digital infrastructure—offering visitors and industry professionals a prime opportunity to explore leading suppliers for smart city projects, gain the latest insights, and network with peers and decision-makers shaping the future of cognitive urban living in Saudi Arabia.

Inquire Now

title: Money20/20 Middle East
description:
Money20/20 Middle East is the region’s definitive fintech event, bringing together over 38,500 visitors, 450+ global brands, 350+ speakers, 400+ investors, and 150+ startups to shape the future of money, finance, and technology. As the most influential gathering in the Middle East, it offers world-class thought leadership, groundbreaking innovations, and high-impact networking that fuels business growth and positions Saudi Arabia at the heart of the global fintech revolution.

Book Now

title: Riyadh Global Medical Biotechnology Summit
description: Under the patronage of His Royal Highness the Crown Prince, the Riyadh Global Medical Biotechnology Summit returns for its fourth edition on 14–16 September 2026, organized by the Ministry of the National Guard (NGHA) in strategic partnership with the Ministry of Investment (MISA). The summit is a leading international platform bringing together government leaders, decision-makers, pharmaceutical executives, innovators, and investors to explore advances in medical biotechnology, cell and gene technologies, and AI in life sciences—supporting Saudi Vision 2030 through innovation, bioeconomy development, and high-quality investment, while reinforcing the Kingdom’s role in biomedical research and future public health solutions.

title: Kingdom Business Luxury Travel Congress
description:
The 5th Annual Kingdom Business Luxury Travel Congress 2026 (KBLT) takes place in Riyadh on 15–16 September 2026, offering a boutique, content-led platform designed for high-level discussions and real business outcomes. Under the theme “The Saudi Connection – Outbound Travel Meets Global Opportunities,” the event connects global luxury travel and hospitality suppliers with Saudi Arabia’s budget-holding buyers through an invitation-only, pre-qualified audience and structured one-to-one meetings. With a tailored agenda focused matchmaking and networking, KBLT provides targeted access to the Kingdom’s fast-growing outbound luxury travel segment while spotlighting Saudi change-makers shaping the future of travel, hospitality, and premium experiences in line with Vision 2030.

Register Now

title: Hotel & Hospitality Expo
description:
Hotel & Hospitality Expo Saudi Arabia takes place in Riyadh from 13–15 September 2026 at the Riyadh Front Exhibition & Conference Center, bringing together leading local and international brands with some of the Kingdom’s most influential buyers across the hotel and hospitality sector. As Saudi Arabia’s tourism and travel growth accelerates in line with Vision 2030, the expo offers a prime platform to build partnerships, discover the latest trends and technologies, and connect with global exhibitors and designers. Visitors can explore a comprehensive range of solutions covering hospitality interiors, operating supplies and equipment, HoReCa and food services, cleaning and hygiene, hospitality technology, hotel services, and wellness (gyms, recreation, spa, and sports).

Inquire Now

title: Saudi Wood Expo
description: The Saudi Wood Expo is the Kingdom’s leading exhibition for the wood and woodworking sector, bringing together suppliers, buyers, and specifiers to discover the latest industry trends, sustainable wood products, and innovative design solutions. Exhibitors and visitors can connect directly with decision-makers, explore new product launches, and build partnerships aligned with the growing demand driven by Saudi Arabia’s Vision 2030 projects. The event is co-located with the Saudi Industrial Series, creating a wider platform for cross-sector networking and business opportunities.

title: Saudi Industrial Series
description: Running from 8 to 10 September 2026 at the Riyadh International Convention & Exhibition Center (RICEC) from 3:00 PM to 9:00 PM, this dedicated industry event returns for its second edition as a platform focused on Saudi Arabia’s industrial expansion. Co-located with Saudi Wood Expo, it brings together thousands of professionals, industry leaders, and decision-makers to explore solutions, suppliers, and partnerships that support growth across key industrial sectors.

title: Lighting Design & Technology Expo
description: Taking place 6–8 September 2026 at Riyadh Front Exhibition & Conference Center, the Lighting Design & Technology Expo is Saudi Arabia’s dedicated platform for lighting professionals, connecting global manufacturers, solution providers, and design specialists with key buyers from giga projects, government entities, and leading developers. From architectural, decorative, and outdoor lighting to smart and sustainable technologies, co‑located with INDEX Saudi Arabia, the expo showcases innovations that enhance aesthetics, energy efficiency, and user experience—serving hospitality, commercial, retail, and residential projects across the Kingdom’s fast-growing construction and design landscape.

title: INDEX  Saudi Arabia (Interior Design Trade Show)
description: INDEX Saudi Arabia takes place 6–8 September 2026 at Riyadh Front Exhibition & Conference Center, bringing together global interior design and fit-out brands with thousands of buyers and decision-makers shaping the Kingdom’s fast-growing design sector. Co-located with Lighting Design & Technology Expo, the event offers a key meeting point for interior designers, architects, developers, hotel owners and operators, fit-out specialists, and distributors to source the latest solutions across furniture, kitchen and bathroom, surfaces and flooring, décor, textiles, lighting, home automation, building materials, and architectural hardware—supported by inspiring conferences and expert speakers.

title: Saudi Food Manufacturing show
description:
Saudi Food Manufacturing returns to Riyadh as the Kingdom’s hub for next-generation food technology, automation, and global partnerships supporting industrial growth and Vision 2030 economic diversification. The show brings together international exhibitors, leading manufacturers, and senior decision-makers to explore smart factories, advanced processing, sustainable solutions, funding and investment opportunities, and the latest innovations shaping the future of F&B manufacturing. Alongside the exhibition, the Food Forward Summit features expert-led insights on innovation economics, greener production, and smarter manufacturing, while the “Get Connected” B2B programme matches exhibitors with selected factory owners and top buyers for focused, high-value meetings on the show floor.

Register Now

title: Saudi WoodShow
description: Saudi WoodShow 2026 runs 1–3 September 2026 at the Riyadh International Convention & Exhibition Center (RICEC) as Saudi Arabia’s dedicated event for the wood and woodworking machinery sector. As part of the internationally recognized Global WoodShow platform, it brings together 250 exhibitors and participants from 54 countries, welcoming thousands of industry professionals to discover wood products, machinery, and production technologies, connect with suppliers and buyers, and explore partnerships that support growth across the Kingdom’s expanding construction and manufacturing landscape.

title: Merath – Middle East Museums & Heritage Expo
description:
Taking place at the Riyadh Front Exhibition & Convention Center, Merath – Middle East Museums & Heritage Expo is the Kingdom’s first dedicated trade event for museums, heritage, and cultural development. The three-day exhibition brings together more than 100 exhibiting companies and over 3,000 visitors, including museums, galleries, science centers, cultural institutions, government entities, private collectors, and heritage developers.

Co-located with the Saudi Entertainment and Amusement Expo (SEA Expo) and the Saudi Light and Sound Expo (SLS Expo), Merath provides a strategic platform to connect with decision-makers and explore opportunities within Saudi Arabia’s rapidly expanding $67 billion heritage and museum market, reinforcing Riyadh’s role as a growing hub for cultural innovation and investment.

title: Saudi Light and Sound (SLS) Expo
description:
Discover the future of Saudi Arabia’s professional light and sound industry at the Saudi Light & Sound (SLS) Exhibition, the premier platform for event technology, lighting design, and audio innovations. The exhibition offers a rare opportunity to present AV and lighting solutions at the heart of a fast-evolving market, with the Pro AV segment valued at $30.5 million in 2024 and projected to reach $40.5 million by 2033, fueled by smart city investments and immersive event infrastructure. Visitors can connect with decision-makers driving billion-dollar projects, explore cutting-edge solutions across pro lighting, audio equipment, stage technology, digital signage, laser effects, and theatrical systems, and position their brand at the forefront of the region’s pro light and sound transformation.

Register Now

title: Saudi Entertainment and Amusement Expo
description:
The Saudi Entertainment and Amusement (SEA) Expo, running for over 8 years in Riyadh, is the Kingdom’s premier platform for the global entertainment and attractions industry. Bringing together innovators, suppliers, and decision-makers from across the Middle East and Africa, the expo showcases the latest technologies and solutions shaping the future of leisure and attractions. More than just an exhibition, SEA Expo offers opportunities to connect with like-minded industry experts, foster collaboration, and take businesses to new heights in Saudi Arabia’s rapidly growing entertainment sector.

Register Now

title: Saudi Warehousing & Logistics Expo
Horses and Equestrian Heritage Exhibition
description: The King Abdulaziz Public Library is hosting a specialized exhibition on horses and equestrian heritage in celebration of Saudi Founding Day. The exhibition showcases a rich collection of manuscripts, rare books, photographs, historical documents, Islamic miniatures, and illustrated works highlighting the deep-rooted equestrian legacy of the Kingdom. Marking four decades of preserving cultural heritage, the library also presents selections from its dedicated Equestrian Center, which houses more than 12,000 rare Arabic and international references on horses, alongside historic photographs captured by Princess Alice of Britain during her 1938 visit to Saudi Arabia.

title: International Falcon Breeders Auction
description:
International Falcon Breeders Auction 2026 takes place from August 5 to 25, bringing together elite breeders, leading local farms, and renowned international falcon producers in Riyadh. Organized by the Saudi Falcons Club, the event celebrates the Kingdom’s rich falconry heritage while reinforcing Saudi Arabia’s position as a global hub for falconry excellence.

The auction has become a trusted international platform for falconers, breeders, and enthusiasts, offering access to distinguished falcon bloodlines and top-tier breeds from around the world. Falcons are available through participating breeders’ pavilions as well as competitive live auction sessions attended by local and international participants. Broadcast on television channels and livestreamed social media platforms, the event reaches a wide global audience and provides enthusiasts with the opportunity to engage with one of the most prominent falconry gatherings of the year.

title: New Global Sport Conference
description: The New Global Sport Conference (NGSC) returns to Riyadh in 2026 as a leading global platform at the intersection of gaming, esports, and sport, bringing together CEOs, founders, investors, and decision-makers to explore partnerships and initiatives shaping the future of these fast-evolving industries. As a flagship event of the Esports World Cup Foundation, NGSC is hosted annually in Riyadh alongside the closing weekend of the Esports World Cup, creating a high-energy setting for industry dialogue, deal-making, and forward-looking conversations connected to the world’s largest esports and gaming festival.

title: Esports World Cup
Prince Faisal Bin Fahd Art Exhibition: Summer 2026
description: The Prince Faisal Bin Fahd Art Exhibition: Summer 2026 returns in its fourth edition, bringing together a diverse group of Saudi and resident artists under a unifying theme 'Ways of Knowing: Art as Interdisciplinary Research,' that explores societal transformation across generations. The exhibition presents a rich collection of works across multiple mediums—including abstract painting, photography, multimedia installations, and conceptual art—offering contemporary perspectives on Saudi cultural identity and evolving social values. Through creative expression, the exhibition highlights the dialogue between past, present, and future, reflecting the dynamic role of art in shaping and interpreting social change.

title: Global AI Show
description:
Global AI Show returns to Riyadh on 29–30 June 2026 as one of the Kingdom’s flagship AI gatherings, bringing together innovators, policy and business leaders, researchers, and technology pioneers to explore how AI is transforming industries and accelerating future-ready growth. With a large-scale exhibition and conference program, the event offers a high-impact setting to discover emerging AI solutions, learn from expert speakers through talks and discussions, and connect with exhibitors, sponsors, media, and decision-makers shaping Saudi Arabia’s intelligent future.

Book Tickets

title: Apply for Japan International MANGA Award
description:
The Embassy of Japan in Saudi Arabia announces the opening of applications for the 20th Japan International MANGA Award, inviting manga artists to participate. The award aims to promote manga culture internationally and strengthen cultural exchange through creative storytelling and artistic expression. The application period runs from April 15 to June 30, 2026. 

Apply Now

title: Middle East Poultry Expo
description:
Middle East Poultry Expo takes place from 28–30 June 2026 at the Riyadh International Convention and Exhibition Center, spanning 16,000 sqm and bringing together investors, suppliers, and global experts across the poultry value chain. Sponsored by the Ministry of Environment, Water and Agriculture, the event supports investment and industry growth in line with Saudi Arabia’s food security strategy, while providing a major trading and networking platform for the sector.

Co-located at the same venue, the Middle East Feed & Mills Expo and the Middle East Animal Health & Nutrition Expo will spotlight the latest technologies in grain milling, storage, logistics, feed production, animal nutrition, and animal health for both livestock and poultry.

Register Now

title: Short Courses in Art & Craft
description:
The Royal Institute of Traditional Arts (Wrth) offers short courses designed to help learners develop new skills and enhance their knowledge of traditional arts and crafts. These training programs provide practical learning opportunities for personal enrichment, further study, or future career growth.

Register Now

title: Registration for Tuwaiq AI Camps and Programs
description:
Tuwaiq Academy launches a series of professional camps and programs in artificial intelligence and modern technologies as part of the Year of Artificial Intelligence 2026 initiative. The programs will be held at the academy’s headquarters in Riyadh and aim to build and empower national capabilities in AI and emerging technologies.

The camps follow a project-based learning approach that focuses on real-world challenges, including developing intelligent models and AI agents. They are designed to support and enhance the skills of students, graduates, and professionals interested in advancing their expertise in artificial intelligence and modern digital technologies.

Participants will gain hands-on experience through practical projects and collaborative learning environments that foster innovation and technical excellence. 

Register Now

title: Saudi Food Expo
description:
Saudi Food Expo is a major platform for the Kingdom’s fast-growing food and beverage ecosystem, bringing together wide range of sectors—from beverages, coffee, dairy, desserts, grains and cereals, fats and oils, meat and poultry, organic products, packaging, hospitality, kitchen equipment, to business solutions and platforms—the expo helps companies build partnerships, discover new vendors and wholesalers, and unlock growth within Saudi Arabia’s booming $54 billion food industry, fueled by mega projects in tourism, entertainment, and hospitality.

Register Now

title: HR Summit & Expo
description:
The HR Summit & Expo KSA will take place on 23–24 June 2026, bringing together over 4,000 HR professionals from across the Kingdom to explore the latest trends, challenges, and innovations shaping the future of work. As Saudi Arabia’s leading HR event, the summit focuses on workplace culture, workforce planning, and the evolving HR landscape. On June 23, the event will also host the HRSE KSA Awards—a celebration honoring outstanding contributions in the HR industry across 13 award categories, judged by 15+ experts and based on over 150 submissions. This special evening marks the debut of the awards in Saudi Arabia, spotlighting excellence in human resources.

Register Now

title: Boulevard Flowers
description:
A unique experience that blends art and nature, transforming spaces into a vibrant world of colorful flowers and creative designs. The event offers visitors an immersive atmosphere featuring artistic sculptures and captivating visual displays that celebrate the beauty of nature through a modern and innovative lens.

Book Now

title: Registration: Emerging New Media Artists Program
description:
Diriyah Art Futures (DAF), a hub for New Media Arts in the Middle East and North Africa, opens its third call for the Emerging New Media Artists Program, inviting emerging creatives in Riyadh to join a one-year development journey. The program offers access to advanced facilities, expert mentorship, and a dedicated production budget, creating a dynamic environment for experimentation and creative growth. Interested applicants are encouraged to review the program details and submit their applications before May 31, 2026.

Register Now

title: International Schools Expo
description:
International Schools Exhibition – School Expo takes place 19–21 May 2026 at The Arena, offering families and education professionals a dedicated platform to explore outstanding learning opportunities. Bringing together private, international, and foreign schools alongside colleges, curriculum developers, and education-support providers, the exhibition highlights a wide range of educational tracks and curricula to help parents identify the best fit for their children’s needs and aspirations. Visitors can also discover the latest in e-learning, curriculum innovation, and educational services, with insights from institutions, education authorities, and specialists in curriculum design—all in one smart destination for informed school choices.

Register Now

title: Of the Earth: Earthly Technologies to Computational Biologies
description:
Of the Earth: Earthly Technologies to Computational Biologies is the fourth major exhibition hosted by Diriyah Art Futures, running from 14 January to 16 May 2026. Curated by Irini Papadimitriou, the exhibition brings together works by more than 30 artists to explore how digital technologies reshape our relationship with the natural world, revealing the material, environmental, and human infrastructures behind systems often perceived as immaterial. Through four thematic sections, the exhibition highlights how technologies are deeply entangled with planetary resources, labour, and ecological responsibility, proposing alternative, ecologically grounded narratives for innovation and care. The program is accompanied by public talks, workshops, and masterclasses.

Book Tickets

title: Saudi Environment Week
description:
Saudi Environment Week 2026 is taking place in Riyadh from May 3–9, organized by the Ministry of Environment, Water and Agriculture. As a national environmental initiative celebrated annually across the Kingdom, the event brings together a wide range of programs, exhibitions, interactive workshops, and awareness campaigns.

Under the theme Your Impact Is Green, it encourages individuals and organizations to contribute to a more sustainable future by protecting natural resources and promoting positive environmental practices. With the participation of over 90 exhibitors and 40+ government entities, and an expected attendance exceeding 20,000 visitors, the event highlights national initiatives, supports innovation, and strengthens collaboration across sectors—creating an engaging experience for all members of the community.

title: IN ACT: Carl Cox & Dish Dash
Gulf AI Symposium in Higher Education
description:
Princess Nourah bint Abdulrahman University presents the Gulf AI Symposium in Higher Education, titled “Smart Transformation and Future Vision,” on May 6 as a virtual interactive platform exploring the role of artificial intelligence in shaping the future of higher education.

The symposium will highlight leading global trends and successful AI applications across academic, administrative, and research fields, demonstrating how smart technologies can enhance institutional performance and improve educational quality.

Bringing together specialists and participants from across the Gulf region, the event also aims to encourage knowledge exchange, strengthen partnerships between educational institutions, and support future-ready learning environments aligned with ongoing digital transformation.

Register Now

title: Mishkat World
description:
Discover Mishkat World at the Mishkat Interactive Center in Riyadh from May 1 to 5, where entertainment and knowledge come together through engaging experiences. The event invites visitors to explore energy concepts through interactive activities, hands-on learning, and innovative exhibits in a fun and accessible environment.

Book Now

title: War Castle
description:
Located in Boulevard World, Riyadh, War Castle invites visitors into an action-packed medieval adventure filled with challenges and excitement. Test your skills with plate throwing and archery, navigate through suspenseful trials, and experience the thrill of competition in a setting inspired by legendary fortresses. With its blend of strategy, precision, and surprise, War Castle delivers an unforgettable experience for adventure seekers during Riyadh Season.

Book Now

title: Escape Room: Secret of the Pharaoh
description:
Escape Room: Secret of the Pharaoh plunges you into the heart of ancient Egypt, where hidden doors, cryptic puzzles, and legendary treasures await. Step inside this immersive experience in the Egypt Zone of BLVD World and face the ultimate challenge: solve ancient riddles, navigate the tomb’s secrets, and choose your fate — will you escape to survival or be lost to the unknown?

Book Now

title: Diriyah Contemporary Art Biennale
description:
The third edition of the Diriyah Contemporary Art Biennale is running at JAX District in Diriyah until 2 May 2026, presented by the Diriyah Biennale Foundation under the theme “In Interludes and Transitions.” Guided by artistic directors Nora Razian and Sabih Ahmed, the biennale explores ideas of transition, migration, and transformation that have long connected the Arabian Peninsula with the wider world—through shared memory, history, language, songs, stories, and rhythms. The programme features 68 artists from more than 37 countries, with 25+ newly commissioned artworks, alongside immersive exhibition design by Formafantasma that reimagines JAX’s industrial architecture; this edition also spotlights music and oral heritage through performances that bring the biennale’s themes to life, reinforcing Diriyah’s role as a vibrant hub for cultural exchange and contemporary creative thought.

Book Now

title: Doll Maker
description:
In the Mexico Zone at Boulevard World, step into the haunting story of Doll Maker, where you become part of a dark and mysterious tale. An old woman’s dolls have come to life with eerie power, and every corner hides a riddle waiting to be solved. As you navigate through this chilling experience, the question remains — will you escape, or become one of them? A must-visit for thrill-seekers during Riyadh Season.

Book Now

title: Cultural Event: Al Samer & Al Muhawarah
description: Al Samer & Al Muhawarah is a Cultural Heritage Experience organized by the Theater and Performing Arts Commission at Qasr Al-Hukm, Riyadh. Bringing together more than 60 performers, the event showcases the richness of Saudi literary and performing arts through live traditional performances that revive authentic heritage in an engaging, interactive setting. Designed to highlight local talent and deepen cultural appreciation, the experience offers audiences a unique opportunity to connect with the roots of Saudi arts, support emerging performers, and enjoy an immersive atmosphere that celebrates identity, storytelling, and artistic expression.

title: Riyadh Season: BLVD World
description:
BLVD World returns with even more excitement, transporting you across continents without leaving Riyadh. With new zones representing Indonesia, South Korea, and Kuwait, along with immersive updates to crowd favorites, this destination combines culture, cuisine, entertainment, and adventure in one vibrant experience. Each country offers a full cultural immersion — from local products and traditional performances to authentic cuisine.

Book Now


	Kingdom of Saudi Arabia: 13 cultural zones with traditional markets and cuisine
	Kuwait: Abayas, local shopping, Harees & Machboos
	Africa: Giraffe feeding, Lemur encounters, African slide, cuisine & crafts
	Türkiye: Turkish markets, Ottoman-style food
	Iran: Persian bazaars, saffron, Zafran Restaurant
	Japan: Sushi, anime, Grendizer statue
	China: Carnival vibe, Chinese markets, traditional cuisine
	France: Parisian elegance, pastries, shopping
	Italy: Gondola rides, pasta, pizza, Italian-style cafes
	Morocco: Tagines, tents, handmade crafts
	Greece: Statues, Greek delicacies, classical designs
	Spain: Mediterranean food, live shows
	Egypt: Pyramids, bazaars, Tante restaurant
	India: Spice-filled food, incense, handmade goods
	Indonesia: Satay, Gado-Gado, Sumatran coffee, wood crafts
	South Korea: K-pop shows, Hanboks, street food
	Levant: Warm hospitality, shared dishes, embroidery
	USA: Hollywood, fast food, Taxi Mania ride
	Asia Pavilion: Thai food, floating market, traditional goods
	Mexico: Maya Mountain, ancient vibes.


At BLVD World, adventure takes many forms — from the thrilling to the scenic. Visitors can explore the artificial Aroya Lagoon, water taxis, floating donut boats, traditional feluccas, Venetian gondolas, and even amphibious cars that drive on land and sail on water. Just steps away, themed experiences await: brave the towering splash of Amazonia Awakens, fly high with SuperFly, or immerse yourself in nostalgia with PAC-MAN and the towering GRENDIZER statue. Puzzle lovers can test their wits in the Lost Museum and Escape Room: Secret of the Pharaoh, while gamers dive into action-packed realms like PUBG Pyramids or battle it out in laser-tag arenas. Families will find joy at BLVD Pier with rides like Skyloop and Turbo 360°, and at the Fun Zone, where kids and adults alike can create unforgettable memories. Don’t miss the Dolphinarium for live shows and encounters, or step into the BLVD Forest and get up close with rare animals in a lush, interactive setting.

Whether you're a local resident or a visitor, BLVD World is your passport to explore cultures, cuisines, games, shows, and adventures—all from one place. It’s Riyadh Season’s largest and most diverse destination, where the world truly meets in Riyadh.

title: Swimming with Dolphins
Midnight Manor​
BLVD World: 442 Football Park
description:
442 Football Park at BLVD World invites you to take on the ultimate football challenge — facing off against the smart, high-speed Robot Keeper! With just six shots, your speed, precision, and timing will be tested as the robot responds in real time to block your goals. Whether you come solo or with friends, this interactive experience promises adrenaline-pumping fun and a competitive edge. Located in the Spain Zone, it’s a must-visit for football fans and thrill-seekers alike.

Book Now

title: CoComelon Playdate
Riyadh Season | AROYA Cruises
description:
AROYA Cruises, the first Arab cruise line and a subsidiary of Cruise Saudi (fully owned by the Public Investment Fund), has partnered strategically with Riyadh Season 2025. As part of this collaboration, its flagship vessel, AROYA, will be designated as an official venue of the season, hosting select events and experiences onboard. This unique partnership adds a maritime dimension to the Season’s entertainment landscape, enriching the overall visitor journey. Making its debut in Riyadh Season, AROYA Cruises will offer scheduled sailings across the Red Sea, the Arabian Gulf, and the Mediterranean—blending authentic Saudi hospitality with world-class luxury. This participation allows guests to discover AROYA Cruises' premium itineraries, designed to meet the highest international standards in leisure travel and showcase the Kingdom’s expanding global tourism footprint.

 



 

AROYA Cruises offers unique voyages departing from the Jeddah Islamic Seaport, providing an immersive Arabian experience for all guests.

Cruise Seasons & Destinations

Red Sea Season


	Sep 20, 2025 – Jan 17, 2026 | May 9 – 29, 2026 | Sep 20 – Nov 22, 2026
	Departing from Jeddah, with stops in: Sharm El-Sheikh, Safaga (Hurghada), Marsa Alam (Port Ghalib), Jabal Al-Sabaya Island, Yanbu


Arabian Gulf Season


	Feb 21 – Apr 30, 2026
	Stops include: Dammam, Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sir Bani Yas, Muscat, Salalah, Khasab, Doha


Mediterranean Season


	Jun 6 – Sep 12, 2026
	Sailing from Istanbul to: Bodrum, Kas, Rhodes, Souda Bay, Mykonos, Athens


Onboard Experience

AROYA Venues:


	29+ restaurants & cafés
	20 entertainment venues
	8 wellness & spa spots
	World-class retail & accommodation options for families, friends & solo travelers


Kids & Teens Areas


	10+ vibrant venues dedicated to young guests
	Safe, engaging, and fun activities designed just for them


Food & Beverage


	12 international cuisines
	17 lounges & cafés
	Special kids’ menus & dining experiences


Remarkably Arabian Stay


	A variety of suites and cabins for every preference
	All-inclusive options with personalized services


Khuzama Experience


	Luxury suites and villas with panoramic sea views
	Exclusive services for Khuzama guests, combining privacy with elegance


How to Book


	Visit aroya.com
	Choose your cruise journey and destination
	Select cabin type and number of guests
	Complete the booking with easy online payment


Book Now

title: BLVD World: Meta World
Battle Kart
BLVD Forest
PUBG Mobile
description:
PUBG Mobile brings an action-packed adventure to the Egypt Zone in Boulevard World, Riyadh, immersing visitors in a world of ancient pyramids, shifting sands, and hidden mysteries. Players navigate mazes, overcome obstacles, and face enemies in a timed challenge that tests skill, strategy, and speed — creating an exciting experience inspired by one of the world’s most popular games.

Buy Tickets

title: BLVD World: Oasis
description:
Oasis Experience at BLVD World offers a playful twist on the traditional beach — instead of water, dive into waves of colorful plastic balls in a lively and safe environment. Located in the Turkey Zone, it is designed for pure joy and endless laughter, this one-of-a-kind attraction creates a memorable beach atmosphere like no other, perfect for families, friends, and fun-seekers of all ages.

Book Now

title: BLVD Dolphinarium
